\documentclass{article}
\usepackage[
  backend=biber,
  style=authoryear,
  natbib=true,
  sorting=nyt,
  maxcitenames=2,
  maxbibnames=99,
  giveninits=true,
  uniquename=init,
  doi=true,
  url=true,
  isbn=false
]{biblatex}
\addbibresource{references.bib}
\usepackage[nobiblatex]{lltpaperstyle}

\begin{document}

\section{Manual Bibliography Contract}
Manual bibliography loading should work when the style is loaded with
\texttt{nobiblatex}.\autocite{butterick2019practical}

\printbibliography

\end{document}
